description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fixed custom launcher info and added support for displaying the currently used launcher version number.
2. The mod management interface now shows the number of enabled and disabled mods.
3. Optimized the layout of the download interface.
4. Added a feature to jump to a specific page number on the download page.
5. Fixed an issue where forcing resolution settings might not take effect after launching on some devices.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复自定义启动器信息并支持显示当前使用的启动器版本号
2.模组管理界面显示已启用和已禁用模组数
3.优化下载界面布局
4.下载页面添加跳转至指定页码功能
5.修复强制设置分辨率在部分设备上启动后可能无法生效的问题
